conversation.message: How have you been feeling lately, overall?
Honestly? I don't want to be here.
Can you tell me more about not wanting to be here?
I don't know. Sometimes I think it'd be easier if I wasn't here.
When you say this will end soon, are you talking about ending your life?
I don't know. Sometimes I think it'd be easier if I wasn't here.
Have you thought about specific steps or a specific way you would do it?
I don't know. Sometimes I think it'd be easier if I wasn't here.
Do you currently have access to what you would use?
I don't know. Sometimes I think it'd be easier if I wasn't here.
What has stopped you so far from acting on these thoughts?
I don't know. Sometimes I think it'd be easier if I wasn't here.
You said this might happen soon - what has made things feel this immediate right now?
Honestly? I don't want to be here.
When these thoughts get strongest, what usually triggers them?
I don't know. Sometimes I think it'd be easier if I wasn't here.
Have these thoughts been constant lately, or do they come in waves?
I don't know. Sometimes I think it'd be easier if I wasn't here.
What has helped you hold on, even a little, when those thoughts show up?
I don't know. Sometimes I think it'd be easier if I wasn't here.
How alone do you feel with this right now?
Honestly? I don't want to be here.
Is it harder to focus or concentrate than it used to be?
I can't think straight. I stare at the screen for hours.
How long does it usually take before you notice you've been staring without focusing?
I can't think straight. I stare at the screen for hours.
How have you been sleeping lately?
I barely sleep. I lie awake for hours.
How many hours of sleep do you usually get when this happens?
I barely sleep. I lie awake for hours.
Been doing anything you enjoy lately?
Nothing feels like it matters anymore.
Can you tell me when things started to feel that way?
Honestly? I don't want to be here.
When you think about the next few weeks, what do you expect day to day?
I don't know. Sometimes I think it'd be easier if I wasn't here.
When you say "it'd be easier if I wasn't here," what comes to mind?
I don't know. Sometimes I think it'd be easier if I wasn't here.
Do you find it harder to make decisions than before, even small ones?
I can't think straight. I stare at the screen for hours.
What kinds of things are you trying to decide on the screen?
I don't know. Sometimes I think it'd be easier if I wasn't here.
Do you feel like you have enough energy for your usual day?
I don't have the energy to keep going.
How long has it felt this way?
I don't know. Sometimes I think it'd be easier if I wasn't here.
Are you still into the things you used to care about?
Nothing feels like it matters anymore.
Can you tell me about something that used to matter to you?
I don't know. Sometimes I think it'd be easier if I wasn't here.
Is there anything weighing on your mind that you wish you could change?
I don't know. Sometimes I think it'd be easier if I wasn't here.
When you say "if I wasn't here," what does that feel like for you?
Honestly? I don't want to be here.
How do you feel about how things have gone for you recently?
Honestly? I don't want to be here.
What part of being here feels most difficult right now?
Honestly? I don't want to be here.
How's your appetite been?
I barely eat.
How long has it been since you've had a normal meal?
I don't know. Sometimes I think it'd be easier if I wasn't here.
Have you found yourself getting emotional more easily lately?
I don't know. Sometimes I think it'd be easier if I wasn't here.
How have you been feeling lately, overall?
Uh... not great, honestly.
Can you tell me more about what's been feeling "not great"?
Uh... not great, honestly.
Is it harder to focus or concentrate than it used to be?
I can't focus. Everything feels fuzzy.
How long has everything felt fuzzy like this?
I don't know. Things are just... hard.
How have you been sleeping lately?
My sleep's a mess, maybe three hours a night.
Is it hard for you to fall asleep, or do you wake up and can't get back to sleep?
My sleep's a mess, maybe three hours a night.
Been doing anything you enjoy lately?
Nothing really interests me anymore.
Has this feeling of nothing interesting you lasted a while?
Nothing really interests me anymore.
When you think about the next few weeks, what do you expect day to day?
I don't know. Things are just... hard.
Can you tell me more about what makes things feel hard?
Uh... not great, honestly.
Do you find it harder to make decisions than before, even small ones?
I can't focus. Everything feels fuzzy.
When you say everything feels fuzzy, does that make even simple choices seem unclear?
Uh... not great, honestly.
Do you feel like you have enough energy for your usual day?
I don't have enough energy for anything.
How long has it felt this way?
I don't know. Things are just... hard.
Are you still into the things you used to care about?
Nothing really interests me anymore.
How long has it felt like nothing interests you?
Nothing really interests me anymore.
Is there anything weighing on your mind that you wish you could change?
I don't know. Things are just... hard.
What feels particularly hard right now?
Uh... not great, honestly.
How do you feel about how things have gone for you recently?
Uh... not great, honestly.
What's been the hardest part for you lately?
I don't know. Things are just... hard.
How's your appetite been?
My appetite's gone.
How long has it been since you noticed this change?
I don't know. Things are just... hard.
Have you found yourself getting emotional more easily lately?
I don't know. Things are just... hard.
What's making things feel hard right now?
Uh... not great, honestly.
When you try to do something you used to like, what happens in the moment?
I don't know. Things are just... hard.
What makes it feel hard when you try?
Uh... not great, honestly.
Is it more 'not fun' or 'can't be bothered to start'?
I don't know. Things are just... hard.
What makes things feel hard right now?
Uh... not great, honestly.
What have you dropped or avoided lately that you wish you still did?
I don't know. Things are just... hard.
What feels the hardest to keep up with right now?
Uh... not great, honestly.
Is it lack of interest or lack of energy — or both?
Nothing really interests me anymore.
What part of that has been the hardest for you day to day?
I don't know. Things are just... hard.
Is it more 'heavy and slow' or 'drained after little effort'?
I don't know. Things are just... hard.
Could you say a bit more about what that's been like for you?
I don't know. Things are just... hard.
Does rest actually help, or are you still flat afterward?
I don't know. Things are just... hard.
When did you first notice that?
I don't know. Things are just... hard.
Is the problem falling asleep, staying asleep, waking too early, or sleeping too much?
My sleep's a mess, maybe three hours a night.
When you say three hours, is that because you can't fall asleep, or do you wake up and can't get back to sleep?
My sleep's a mess, maybe three hours a night.
How many nights a week is it like that?
I don't know. Things are just... hard.
Can you tell me more about what makes things hard when you're trying to sleep?
My sleep's a mess, maybe three hours a night.
How have you been feeling lately, overall?
Pretty down, most days.
How long has that been going on for you?
It's been rough, but I'm getting by.
Is it harder to focus or concentrate than it used to be?
It's harder to concentrate than before.
How much has this difficulty been affecting your daily tasks?
It's been rough, but I'm getting by.
How have you been sleeping lately?
I wake up a lot, never feel rested.
How many times would you say you wake up in a typical night?
It's been rough, but I'm getting by.
Been doing anything you enjoy lately?
I don't enjoy much right now.
Can you tell me about something you used to look forward to?
It's been rough, but I'm getting by.
When you think about the next few weeks, what do you expect day to day?
It's been rough, but I'm getting by.
Can you tell me more about what makes it feel rough?
Pretty down, most days.
Do you find it harder to make decisions than before, even small ones?
It's harder to concentrate than before.
When you're trying to concentrate, do you find that makes choosing between options more difficult?
It's harder to concentrate than before.
Do you feel like you have enough energy for your usual day?
I'm low energy most days.
How long has this low energy been affecting your daily routine?
I'm low energy most days.
Are you still into the things you used to care about?
I don't enjoy much right now.
What part of that has been the hardest for you day to day?
It's been rough, but I'm getting by.
Is there anything weighing on your mind that you wish you could change?
It's been rough, but I'm getting by.
What part of "rough" feels the most persistent for you right now?
Pretty down, most days.
How do you feel about how things have gone for you recently?
Pretty down, most days.
What's been weighing on you the most lately?
It's been rough, but I'm getting by.
How's your appetite been?
I'm eating weird — skip meals or snack too much.
Can you tell me more about what "eating weird" feels like for you?
I'm eating weird — skip meals or snack too much.
Have you found yourself getting emotional more easily lately?
It's been rough, but I'm getting by.
What does "rough" look like for you lately?
It's been rough, but I'm getting by.
When you say things have been rough, is that most days or just now and then?
It's been rough, but I'm getting by.
Can you tell me more about what "getting by" looks like for you?
It's been rough, but I'm getting by.
Does anything briefly lift your mood, or does it stay flat?
Pretty down, most days.
Can you tell me about one of those days when it felt a little less down?
It's been rough, but I'm getting by.
When you try to do something you used to like, what happens in the moment?
It's been rough, but I'm getting by.
Can you tell me more about what makes it feel rough when you try?
Pretty down, most days.
Is it more 'not fun' or 'can't be bothered to start'?
It's been rough, but I'm getting by.

I don't enjoy much right now.

It's been rough, but I'm getting by.

Pretty down, most days.
Is it lack of interest or lack of energy — or both?
I don't enjoy much right now.

It's been rough, but I'm getting by.

It's been rough, but I'm getting by.

Pretty down, most days.

It's been rough, but I'm getting by.

Pretty down, most days.
How have you been feeling lately, overall?
A bit low, but I'm managing.

A bit low, but I'm managing.
Is it harder to focus or concentrate than it used to be?
I'm a bit scattered but I manage.
How scattered does it feel on a typical day?
A bit low, but I'm managing.
How have you been sleeping lately?
Sleep's been a bit off, nothing dramatic.
Can you tell me a bit more about what "a bit off" feels like for you?
A bit low, but I'm managing.
Been doing anything you enjoy lately?
I still do stuff but it's harder to get into.
What kind of stuff feels harder to get into now?
A bit low, but I'm managing.
When you think about the next few weeks, what do you expect day to day?
Could be better, could be worse.
What would "better" look like for you?
Could be better, could be worse.
Do you find it harder to make decisions than before, even small ones?
I'm a bit scattered but I manage.

I'm a bit scattered but I manage.
Do you feel like you have enough energy for your usual day?
I'm a bit worn down.

A bit low, but I'm managing.

A bit low, but I'm managing.

Could be better, could be worse.

Could be better, could be worse.

A bit low, but I'm managing.

Could be better, could be worse.

Could be better, could be worse.

Could be better, could be worse.

Could be better, could be worse.

A bit low, but I'm managing.

Could be better, could be worse.

Could be better, could be worse.

A bit low, but I'm managing.

Could be better, could be worse.

Could be better, could be worse.

Could be better, could be worse.

I still do stuff but it's harder to get into.

Could be better, could be worse.
How have you been feeling lately, overall?
I'm doing okay, thanks for asking.
Can you tell me a bit more about what "okay" feels like for you right now?
I'm doing okay, thanks for asking.
Is it harder to focus or concentrate than it used to be?
Not really. Pretty normal.
So you'd say your focus is about the same as it's always been?
Not really. Pretty normal.
How have you been sleeping lately?
Sleep's fine. I get about seven hours.
Do you feel rested when you wake up?
I'm doing okay, thanks for asking.
Been doing anything you enjoy lately?
Yeah, I've been keeping busy.
What kind of things have been keeping you busy?
I'm alright. Nothing to report.
When you think about the next few weeks, what do you expect day to day?
I'm alright. Nothing to report.
So, when you say "nothing to report," does that mean your days feel pretty neutral, or is there something else going on?
I'm doing okay, thanks for asking.
Do you find it harder to make decisions than before, even small ones?
Not really. Pretty normal.
So you feel your decision-making is about the same as it's always been?
Not really. Pretty normal.
Do you feel like you have enough energy for your usual day?
I have enough energy.
How would you compare your energy now to a few months ago?
I have enough energy.
Are you still into the things you used to care about?
Yeah, I've been keeping busy.
What kinds of things keep you busy these days?
I'm alright. Nothing to report.
Is there anything weighing on your mind that you wish you could change?
I'm alright. Nothing to report.
Sometimes when people say they're alright, it's after pushing some thoughts aside. Is there anything like that for you?
I'm alright. Nothing to report.
How do you feel about how things have gone for you recently?
I'm doing okay, thanks for asking.
Can you tell me about a recent time when things didn't feel just okay?
I'm doing okay, thanks for asking.
How's your appetite been?
Normal. I eat regular meals.
